description.en: Souvenirs and engineers. Come and chat with us to get free gifts!
description.zh-TW: 攤位附有小贈品、工程師，歡迎找我們聊天拿贈品

description.en: Visit our booth to chat with us and fill in a questionnaire to play a free gift lottery!
description.zh-TW: 邀請您來和Moxa夥伴一起自由交流各種主題。填寫問卷可以抽Line Points!

description.en: Oracle provides mini speeches, prizes, games (Shi Ba La or ...). Come and play with us!
description.zh-TW: 這裡有：迷你演講,有奬徵答,遊戲(Shi Ba La or ...)大放送，快來找我們

description.en: Come visit Chatbot.tw Community Booth any time !
description.zh-TW: 歡迎來社群攤位找我們聊天

description.en: Come visit Ubuntu-TW Community Booth any time !
description.zh-TW: 我們會做個關於 Ubuntu 的簡介，然後根據簡介出幾個問題讓活動參與者回答，有回答出答案就可以獲得點數

description.en:
The date of this booth is 8/2
Golang Taiwan is a technical community with more tha「n 8,500 members aims to connect gophers together. We hold monthly meetups to share fantastic Golang experiences and discuss the latest topics on the community channels. Sharing the event post from Golang Taiwan group on Facebook to get a point!
description.zh-TW:
此攤位擺攤日期為 8/2 
台灣社群 Go程式語言 (Golang Taiwan, Gopher Taipei) 由一群熱愛 Go 語言的開發者所組成，目前擁有超過 8,500 位成員，除了每個月固定一次技術聚會之外，也經常在社群內分享相關議題，並且樂於協助新入門的朋友們！只要在 Facebook 分享 Golang 社團專屬活動貼文，就能獲得集點一個！

description.en: GDGs are community-led groups of developers who are interested in Google’s developer technology. These groups conduct in-person meetups with demos and talks, both small and large, and sometimes include activities like code sprints and hackathons.
description.zh-TW: Google Developer Groups (GDG) 是由喜歡 Google 開 發技術的開發者們所組織的社群，這些社群會舉辦一些技 術分享、實作等等活動，有時也會有一起黑客松！

description.en: The blockchain application developer community's purpose is to gather blockchain developers and fanatics as well as novices to discuss how the technology can be practically applied in various fields.Leave your e-mail and subscribe to follow our community to get the point!
description.zh-TW: 區塊鏈應用開發者社群聚會主要在討論區塊鏈如何實際應用在各個領域上，也致力於讓所有藉由參與我們社群活動的初心者，也能簡易入門，一同參與社群活動。留下你的 e-mail 訂閱關注我們的社群，即可拿到一點！

description.en:
1. Help validate x5 Common Voice clips on your phone to get Creative Commons swag ( https://voice.mozilla.org/listen , listen to recording and verify if it's accurately)
2. Following daily instructions on Mozilla @Line and earn some Firefox swags
description.zh-TW:
1. 協助驗證 Common Voice 錄音x5，可以到攤位領取創用 cc 紀念品 ( https://voice.mozilla.org/zh-TW/listen 播放錄音，並確認該音檔是否與畫面上的句子相符)
2. 完成 Mozilla @Line 的當日任務指引，可以領取 Firefox 紀念品

description.en:
Welcome to RubyTaiwan! To Win the prize by completing the following steps:

Step.1 Take a picture at the venue.
Step.2 Check-in  on Facebook.
Step.3 Hashtag #RubyTaiwanXCoscup2020
description.zh-TW:
歡迎來到 RubyTaiwan 社群攤位認識我們，只要完成以下步驟，完成後即可選一項遊戲（洞洞樂、懷舊復古童玩彈珠台）領獎！大家走過路過千萬不要錯過：）

1. 在會場拍照
2. 上臉書打卡
3. 標籤 #RubyTaiwanXCoscup2020

description.en:
SITCON (Students' Information Technology Conference) is organized spontaneously by a community of students who are passionate about information. It is hoped that through the agitation of technology and knowledge, give students a stage to practice their dreams with their own strength!

1. Open Facebook
2. Search and like SITCON
description.zh-TW:
SITCON（Students' Information Technology Conference, 學生計算機年會），是由對資訊抱持熱誠的學生們所組成的同名社群自發籌辦，希望能透過技術與知識的激盪，給予學生們一個用自身力量實踐夢想的舞台！

1. 打開臉書
2. 在 SITCON 粉專按讚

description.en:
Welcome to Taichung Open Source Community! To Win the prize by completing the following steps:

Step.1 Take a picture at the venue.
Step.2 Check-in  on Facebook/ add the Telegram channel.
Step.3 Hashtag #TOSC@Monospace
description.zh-TW:
台中開源聯合社群攤位是由台中在地開源社群 TFC、WordPress 社群聯合上去推廣，歡迎大家來認識我們。

1. 在會場拍照
2. 上臉書打卡/加入活動群組
3. 標籤 #台中開源社群@Monospace

description.en: The Open Culture Foundation (OCF), is a nonpartisan, nonprofit organization, founded in 2014 by several members of Taiwan's open source community. Our main goal is to support local communities advocate the use of open technologies in broader sectors, including open source software, open hardware, and open data.  Come to OCF's booth, and we will introduce ourselves to you. After answer a question, then you'll get one point!
description.zh-TW: 財團法人開放文化基金會（Open Culture Foundation，簡稱 OCF）成立的主要目的，是希望能夠藉由法人組織的力量，協助台灣資訊軟體界的開放源碼社群，包含開放原始碼軟體、開放資料、開放政府 (公民參與)。三個主要領域的發展和應用。只要到 OCF 攤位聽介紹並回答一個小問題，就可以獲得一點！

description.en:
Please complete one of the three tasks below:
(1) We invite you to provide your advice regarding the demo webpage (http://bit.ly/tree-taiwan-sites) at the booth or at our Facebook's pinned post (http://bit.ly/tree-taiwan-fb).
(2) Select a specific location, and use the Unlimited Cities DIY web tool (https://bit.ly/Unlimited-Cities-DIY-demo) to complete an environmental design vision map. We certainly welcome friends who are familiar with React to develop together.
(3) If you have any thoughts on our analysis methods and tools, we love to hear from you. (https://sites.google.com/view/tree-taiwan)
description.zh-TW:
三項任務擇一完成：
(1) 針對找地網頁 demo，邀請您提供意見 (http://bit.ly/tree-taiwan-sites)，請於攤位撰寫便利貼，或加入專案 FB 社團回覆意見，見置頂頂貼文 (http://bit.ly/tree-taiwan-fb)。
(2) 挑選明確地點，使用 Unlimited Cities DIY 網頁工具 (https://bit.ly/Unlimited-Cities-DIY-demo)，完成一張環境設計願景圖，也歡迎熟悉 React 的朋友一起 fork 開發。
(3) 若您對於專案所使用的分析與工具有經驗與想法，歡迎您分享給我們，謝謝 (https://sites.google.com/view/tree-taiwan)。

集點換贈品或是加價購啦！
請造訪以上攤位刷你的 QRcode 獲得點數．然後就可以到 3F 大會攤位兌換贈品或是加價購！
description.en:
Get the points to exchange the souvenirs.
Please visit the booths obove, scan your QRcode to get the points. And visit COSCUP Booth at 3F to exchange souvenirs or buy!
